#import <Foundation/NSObjCRuntime.h>

#pragma clang diagnostic push
#pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wobjc-property-no-attribute"
#import "transpiler/javatests/com/google/j2cl/readable/java/j2ktswiftname/readable-j2kt-jvm-kt.h"
#pragma clang diagnostic pop

NS_ASSUME_NONNULL_BEGIN

#ifndef ObjCClass
#define ObjCClass J2ktObjCClass
#endif  // !defined(ObjCClass)

NS_INLINE J2ktObjCClass* create_ObjCClass_init(void) {
 return [[J2ktObjCClass alloc] init];
}

NS_INLINE J2ktObjCClass* new_ObjCClass_init(void) {
 return [[J2ktObjCClass alloc] init];
}

NS_ASSUME_NONNULL_END

#endif  // J2KTSWIFTNAME_SWIFTANDOBJCNAMECLASS_H_
